transcript_path.description: Wiki-relative path of the transcript this debrief is derived from (e.g. raw/transcripts/2026-04-25-craig-xxx.md).

tldr.description: 2-5 bullet-point summary of the meeting (markdown, one line per bullet).

decisions.description: Concrete decisions taken during the meeting. Empty array if none.

open_questions.description: Questions raised but not resolved. Empty array if none.

action_items.description: Actionable items proposed by the LLM, awaiting user validation in the Discord thread.

id.description: 1-based index, must be unique within the action_items array.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what needs to happen.

kind.description: Concrete dispatch target — which downstream skill should handle this action.

target.description: Routing target. github-issue → 'owner/repo'. hermes-cron → cron name. gmail-draft → recipient email. obsidian-note → vault-relative path. linear-task → team key.

when.description: Optional scheduling info. ISO date, cron expression, or natural-language ('next monday'). Required for hermes-cron.

body.description: Optional pre-filled body (markdown for github-issue/obsidian-note, plain text for gmail-draft).

confidence.description: LLM self-rated confidence that this action is real and well-routed. < 0.6 → flag for closer user review.
